name: s1-brdr1
description: Verifies the session state of BGP peers.
messages: Peer: 172.16.1.16 VRF: default - Incorrect session state - Expected: Established Actual: Connect
Peer: 172.16.1.18 VRF: default - Incorrect session state - Expected: Established Actual: Connect

name: s1-brdr1
description: Verifies the connection status of the specified LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) neighbors.
messages: Port: Ethernet2 Neighbor: s1-spine1.atd.lab Neighbor Port: Ethernet6 - Wrong LLDP neighbors: s1-spine1.atd.lab/Ethernet7
Port: Ethernet3 Neighbor: s1-spine2.atd.lab Neighbor Port: Ethernet6 - Wrong LLDP neighbors: s1-spine2.atd.lab/Ethernet7

name: s1-brdr1
description: Verifies point-to-point reachability between Ethernet interfaces.
messages: Host: 172.16.1.16 Source: 172.16.1.17 VRF: default - Packet loss detected - Transmitted: 1 Received: 0
Host: 172.16.1.18 Source: 172.16.1.19 VRF: default - Packet loss detected - Transmitted: 1 Received: 0

name: s1-brdr1
description: Verifies that no partition is utilizing more than 75% of its disk space.
messages: Mount point: overlay          60G   47G   14G  78% / - Higher disk space utilization - Expected: 75% Actual: 78%
Mount point: /dev/sda2        60G   47G   14G  78% /mnt/flash - Higher disk space utilization - Expected: 75% Actual: 78%
